```{=html}
<link rel="icon" href="/apps/rhythms/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon">
	<link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/shared/abcjs-audio.css">
	
	<style>
		/* App-specific overrides and additions */
		select {
			height: 26px;
		}
		.abcjs-inline-audio .abcjs-midi-tempo {
			margin: 0 0 0 -10px;
		}
		.abcjs-midi-clock, .abcjs-midi-progress-background,
		.abcjs-midi-progress-indicator, .abcjs-midi-reset {
			display: none !important;
		}
		#audio {
			width: 160px;
			height: 26px;
		}
		#the-top {
			padding: 20px 0;
		}
		main {
			max-width: 770px;
			margin: 0 auto;
		}
		.feedback {
			display: none;
		}
		.highlight {
			fill: #0057b7;
		}
		.abcjs-cursor {
			stroke: #ffd700;
			stroke-width: 4;
		}
		.click-explanation {
			color: #ffd700;
			font-style: italic;
		}
		.beat {
			display: none;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.label {
			color: #888888;
		}
		.midi {
			margin-top: -20px;
			margin-left: 5px;
		}
		.seek-controls {
			margin-top: 5px;
		}
		.seek-controls.disabled {
			background-color: #cccccc;
			opacity: 0.5;
		}
		.warp, .seek, .download {
			display: none;
		}
		textarea, .seek-controls, .abcjs-download-midi, .clicked-info {
			display: none;
		}
		.tuneButtons, input {
			display: inline-block;
		}
		input {
			width: 40px;
		}
		button {
			margin: 0 1%;
			height: 26px;
		}
		.buddy {
			display: inline-block;
		}
		.buddy > label {
			margin-left: 15px;
		}
		.checkbox {
			margin-left: -13px;
		}
		.abcjs-staff {
			display: none;
		}
		.abcjs-btn {
			margin-left: -5px;
		}
		.options {
			display: flex;
			align-items: left;
			justify-content: left;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
			row-gap: 2px;
		}
	</style>
	<script>
		let abc = [];
		let bars = [];
		let details = "";
		let rests = false;
		let currentTune = 0;
		let synthControl;

		function setRests() {
			rests = document.getElementById("set-rests").checked;
			setTune();
		}

		function refreshSongbook(someAbc) {
			const tuneBook = new ABCJS.TuneBook(someAbc);
			const selectTune = document.getElementById("tune-selector");
			selectTune.innerHTML = "";
			abc.length = 0;
			bars.length = 0;
			for (let i = 0; i < tuneBook.tunes.length; i++) {
				const option = document.createElement("option");
				option.textContent = tuneBook.tunes[i].id;
				option.value = i;
				let abcString = tuneBook.tunes[i].abc;
				abc.push(abcString);
				const lines = abcString.split("\n");
				if (i !== tuneBook.tunes.length - 1) lines.pop();
				bars.push(lines.pop());
				lines.shift();
				details = lines.join("\n");
				selectTune.appendChild(option);
			}
		}

		function refreshCollection() {
			const collection = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
			refreshSongbook(rhythmPatternObject[collection]);
			pickTune();
		}

		function load() {
			const selectCollection = document.getElementById("collection-selector");
			for (const key in rhythmPatternObject) {
				const option = document.createElement("option");
				option.textContent = key;
				option.value = key;
				selectCollection.appendChild(option);
			}

			const RH_CFG = window.TOOL_CONFIG || {};
			if (RH_CFG.collections && RH_CFG.collections.length)
				Array.from(selectCollection.options).forEach(function(o) { if (RH_CFG.collections.indexOf(o.value) === -1) o.remove(); });
			if (RH_CFG.lockCollections || selectCollection.options.length <= 1)
				document.getElementById('collection-selector').style.display = 'none';

			refreshSongbook(rhythmPatternObject[selectCollection.value]);

			document.querySelector(".next").addEventListener("click", next);
			document.querySelector(".warp").addEventListener("click", warp);
			document.querySelector(".seek").addEventListener("click", seek);
			document.querySelector(".seek2").addEventListener("click", seek2);
			document.querySelector("#seek-units").addEventListener("change", seekExplanation);

			if (ABCJS.synth.supportsAudio()) {
				synthControl = new ABCJS.synth.SynthController();
				synthControl.load("#audio", cursorControl, {
					displayLoop: true, displayRestart: true,
					displayPlay: true, displayProgress: true, displayWarp: true
				});
			} else {
				document.querySelector("#audio").innerHTML =
					"<div class='audio-error'>Audio is not supported in this browser.</div>";
			}

			setTune(false);
		}

		function setTune(userAction, r) {
			// Disable the random-pattern button for "Unmetered" collections
			const pattern = document.getElementById("collection-selector").value;
			const isUnmetered = /U/.test(pattern);
			document.getElementById("randomPattern").disabled = isUnmetered;
			if (isUnmetered) r = false;

			let abcString = abc[currentTune];

			if (r) {
				const pattern1 = bars[Math.floor(Math.random() * bars.length)];
				const pattern2 = bars[Math.floor(Math.random() * bars.length)];
				abcString = details + "\n" + pattern1 + pattern2;
			}

			const barCount = (abcString.match(/\|/g) || []).length;
			const lines = abcString.split("\n");
			lines[0] += "\n%%MIDI channel 10 ";

			// Append closing bar and optional rest measure
			const lastIndex = (currentTune === abc.length - 1 && !r)
				? lines.length - 1
				: lines.length - 2;
			if (rests) lines[lastIndex] += "Z" + barCount + "|";
			lines[lastIndex] += "|";
			if (r) lines.push("");

			abcString = lines.join("\n");

			const abcOptions = { add_classes: true, clickListener: clickListener };
			const seekControls = document.querySelector(".seek-controls");
			seekControls.classList.add("disabled");
			synthControl.disable(true);

			const visualObj = ABCJS.renderAbc("paper", abcString, abcOptions)[0];
			document.querySelector(".midi").innerHTML = ABCJS.synth.getMidiFile(abc[currentTune]);

			const synthOpts = { midiTranspose: -11 };

			new ABCJS.synth.CreateSynth().init({
				visualObj: visualObj,
				options: { soundFontUrl: "https://paulrosen.github.io/midi-js-soundfonts/MusyngKite/" }
			}).then(function() {
				if (synthControl) {
					synthControl.setTune(visualObj, userAction, synthOpts).then(function() {
						seekControls.classList.remove("disabled");
						seekExplanation();
					}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
				}
			}).catch(function(error) { console.warn("Audio problem:", error); });
		}

		function next() {
			currentTune = (parseInt(currentTune) + 1) % abc.length;
			document.getElementById("tune-selector").value = currentTune;
			setTune(true);
		}

		function pickTune() {
			currentTune = parseInt(document.getElementById("tune-selector").value);
			setTune(true);
		}
	</script>

<div id="rhythms-root">
	<div class="container">
		<main>
			<button class="download" style="display: none;">Download</button>
			<div class="seek-controls disabled">
				<label>Seek: <input type="number" min="0" id="seek-amount"></label>
				<select aria-label="seek units" id="seek-units">
					<option value="percent">Percent</option>
					<option value="seconds">Seconds</option>
					<option value="beats">Beats</option>
				</select>
				<button class="seek2">Seek</button>
				<span id="unit-explanation" class="click-explanation">First start playing to load audio before seeking.</span>
			</div>
			<div class="midi">MIDI</div>
			<div id="paper"></div>
			<br>
			<div class="inflow">
				<div class="positioner">
					<div class="fixed">
						<div id="the-top" class="options">
							<div class="buddy">
								<select id="collection-selector" onchange="refreshCollection()"></select>
								<select id="tune-selector" onchange="pickTune()"></select>
							</div>
							<button class="next">Next</button>
							<button id="randomPattern" onclick="setTune(true, true)">Rand</button>
							<div id="audio"></div>
							<input type="checkbox" id="set-rests" onclick="setRests()">
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			<div class="tuneButtons">
				<button class="warp">Rand. Warp</button>
				<button class="seek">Seek to Middle</button>
			</div>
			<p class="beat"></p>
			<p class="click-explanation" style="display:none;">Click on a note to play that note.</p>
			<pre class="clicked-info"></pre>
			<pre class="feedback"></pre>
		</main>
	</div>
	<script src="/apps/shared/abcjs-basic.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
	<script src="/apps/shared/cursor-synth.js"></script>
	<script>
		const cursorControl = new CursorControl();
		load();
	</script>
</div>
<script src="/apps/shared/space-play.js"></script>
```
